title: Agent Joe Walker: Operation Far East
writer: Stefan Gommermann, Gianfranco Parolini, Paul Alfred Müller
actors: Tony Kendall, Brad Harris, Barbara Frey
plot: A scientist invents a filter that can increase the power of a laser beam, turning it into a death ray! A dangerous crime organization wants the device and will stop at nothing to get it, while murder and violence follow Joe and To...
